commit_message:
MSU1: Code cleanup (no function change) MSU1: Code cleanup (no function change) I introduced a warning in my last commit, so I gave the rest of the code some TLC. This PR will free up some logic and better code/schematic quality overall.

- Fix synthesis warning introduced in my last commit
- Remove MSB from `MSU_SEEK` and `MSU_TRACK`, they were being set upon write but never used
- Fix MSU module `DOUT` being set sequentially
- Fix audio state machine having 8 bit register for only 5 state
